calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trsut And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trsut And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Continued To Nov-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffery Woo appeared by telephone for Bonifacio Camarao (Petitioner).
Edwin Camarao (Co-Trustee) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.
Milagros Josue (Co-Trustee) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Mr. Woo stated that they settled in a way of either dismissing the petition in 10 to 15-days, or if the Co-Trustees are unable to pay and the settlement falls apart, they would ask for a continuance in November. The Petition for Relief from Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to November 2, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the matter is not dismissed, Mr. Woo is to file a status report by October 26, 2020.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Verified Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trsut And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Woo, Esq. counsel for Petitioner/beneficiary, Bonifacio Camarao, Jr.; Edwin Cararao, Co-trustee/objector in pro per; Milagros Josue, Co-trustee/objector in pro per; William Camarao, interested person/brother; Norma Camarao, interested person/sister.

Court, counsel and unrepresented parties and interested persons discuss the proposed sale of the sole trust asset to the co-trustee, Edwin Camarao. A number of family members proffer that the late mother's express statements were to the effect that the home was to remain in the family and that the sale to their brother would best effect the late mother's wishes.

After further discussion, the Court offers the parties pro bono mediation to which all parties/family members consent. The Court refers the matter to pro bono mediation by minute order. Mediation is to be completed by September 14, 2020. Mr. Woo will file a status report with conformed copy to the assigned Probate Examiner by September 4, 2020. Other family members may respond to the same in writing. The Court continues the hearing on the current matter to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)
